name: Kansas Attorney General Roofing Registration Directory
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official directory before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Kansas roofing registration records exposed by the Attorney General roofing registration directory
knownExclusions: Kansas does not have a single statewide general contractor source represented by this entry.
The directory is scoped to roofing registration and exempt registrants under Kansas roofing-registration law.
Local contractor licenses, permits, business registrations, and non-roofing trade authorizations are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not automate the lookup unless access controls, terms, and technical behavior are reviewed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official roofing registration metadata only. Registration status is not an endorsement, and absence from this source is not proof that a local authorization or non-roofing credential does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Kansas roofing registration. Future work should model the Attorney General's status descriptions conservatively.
maintainerNotes: Keep the distinction between registration, exemption, and broader contractor licensing visible in docs and adapter work.
